title: Marinated Meaty Slovakian Pork Kebabs
description: A Mediterranean-friendly Slovakian dish featuring green olives and marinated pork, served in agave leaves. This meal is perfect for a quick and flavorful dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated pork and green olives onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
While the pork is cooking, prepare the agave leaves by rinsing them with water and patting them dry.
Once the pork is cooked, remove it from the grill and wrap each skewer in an agave leaf.
Serve the pork kebabs hot, garnished with additional green olives if desired.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
